# Story: Add cron job for nightly aggregation

## User Story

As an operator, I want a scheduled aggregation job so that morning reports are
ready before standup.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC1: Given the scheduler, when 02:00 UTC arrives, then aggregation runs.
